name: synthesized-note-created
description: Synthesized fixture (no real-DB note webhook in the extracted set). One notesCreated webhook should produce exactly one note.created domain event with entity_type=note and entity_id matching the resourceId.

expected.notes: Append event: min not exact, since no uniqueness claim applies to notes. The harness's mock FUB client does not fetch note body content; the engine emits from the webhook payload directly.
